seo.title: Claude Vs HagiCode
seo.description: Understand what Claude already does well and why HagiCode turns those strengths into a structured, multi-agent engineering workflow.

summary: Claude is already a strong coding assistant, but HagiCode gives it the workspace, orchestration, and operating model needed for real multi-task development.

content: Claude is widely trusted for long-context reasoning, careful code review, and conversational collaboration across large codebases.

items.title: Coding and editing
content: Claude can generate, revise, and explain code across front-end, back-end, and infrastructure tasks.

items.title: Repository analysis
content: Claude can absorb large codebases, surface risks, and explain module relationships with useful engineering context.

items.title: Conversation-driven workflow
content: Claude keeps multi-step discussions coherent, which makes it effective for proposal-driven implementation work.

sections.title: Why HagiCode Makes Claude More Effective

items.label: Parallel execution
items.agent: Claude is strong inside one session.
items.hagicode: HagiCode coordinates many Claude-powered sessions at once.
items.combinedValue: You get parallel delivery instead of sequential waiting.

items.label: OpenSpec workflow
items.agent: Claude can reason well about implementation plans.
items.hagicode: HagiCode turns those plans into tracked proposals, tasks, and archiveable change records.
items.combinedValue: Decisions stay reviewable after the coding session ends.

items.label: Agent orchestration
items.agent: Claude sessions do not provide a fleet view on their own.
items.hagicode: HagiCode exposes identities, status, and task ownership for each active agent.
items.combinedValue: Multi-agent work stays understandable to humans.

items.title: AI-assisted commits
content: HagiCode can turn completed work into consistent commit narratives so repository history stays readable.

items.title: Vault and Monospecs context
content: Claude benefits from stable cross-repo maps and long-lived reference material instead of rebuilding context every time.

items.title: Flexible model routing
content: HagiCode separates the CLI experience from the model subscription path so teams can optimize cost and capability independently.

blocks.title: Bottom line
content: Claude supplies the reasoning engine. HagiCode supplies the workspace, orchestration, and repeatable workflow that let that reasoning scale into team-grade delivery.
